word: H2856 - חָתַם - châtham - khaw-tham' - Make an end

sections.paragraph:
Original: חתם

Transliteration: châtham

Phonetic: khaw-tham'

BDB Definition:

  1. to seal, seal up, affix a seal
    1. (Qal)
      1. to seal, affix one's seal
      2. to seal up, fasten up by sealing
    2. (Niphal) to seal
    3. (Piel) to lock up
    4. (Hiphil) to be stopped

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 780

Part(s) of speech: Verb
